title: acmella marajoensis
intro: Acmella marajoensis, also known as the Parachute Plant, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Acmella marajoensis include relief from pain, reduction of inflammation, and improvement of digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used externally to treat skin conditions and internally to support overall well-being.
